title: Nayverse [16x] - Black & White
description: A black and white recolor of my texture pack the Nayverse [16x]
body:
Nayverse Black and white is a texture pack made for 1.8.9 pvp based arround an older pack i've made : The NayPack ([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/naypack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/naypack)

It is a milestone pack made to myself for reaching 250 subs :)

It exists in 4 other recolors and use the Clandestine 16x as a base pack (even though almost all textures are vanilla or made by me)

Even though it takes inspiration out of the Naypack, it is made from the ground up and has a very different aesthetic.

![Nayverse Black 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e2a042953e1ee7dc8a99afdbd707ad9448f6997_0.webp)

![Nayverse black 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08d5a557b10d3b16ec57b7f57b3e023d9beec36d_0.webp)

![Nayverse black 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df67927b7a90801595e656bb87c6ae5d0cb2c208.jpeg)

Here are some other recolors also available on modrinth :) :

Purple - [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nayverse](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nayverse)

![Nayverse prev 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faeafb0c6d1fe06029e5d86c667e4bbd15fa1af8.jpeg)

Orange - [https://modrinth.com/project/nayverse-orange](https://modrinth.com/project/nayverse-orange)

![Nayverse Orange 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/448ad1198e7e22f1dcd31fd71c87d7a170bf8238_0.webp)

Vanilla - [https://modrinth.com/project/nayverse-vanilla](https://modrinth.com/project/nayverse-vanilla)

![Nayverse Vanilla 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83a5ac8758ffbd3933a2d9eedc929d893841e4de_0.webp)

Sky Blue - [https://modrinth.com/project/nayverse-sky-blue](https://modrinth.com/project/nayverse-sky-blue)

![Nayverse Sky Blue 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c18735bd99db1bf78280d3320bde95539fce3c01_0.webp)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
